flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Judson University fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (57.2% → 42.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Judson University fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (923 → 708).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Judson University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (66.4% → 59.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Judson University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (66.9% → 59.9%).
